name: Andy Reese

contactInfo.office: 121 E. Dallas St., Room 202, Canton, TX 75103

bio: Andy Reese serves as the Van Zandt County Judge, the chief executive and administrative officer of Van Zandt County. The county judge presides over the Commissioners Court and oversees county government operations including budgeting, emergency management, and infrastructure in the Canton area.
campaignPromises: Keep Van Zandt County taxes low while maintaining services
Support law enforcement and public safety
